chorus_fruit.title: Collect Chorus Fruit from the outer islands

end_city_found.title: Locate an End City on the outer islands

shulker_shell.title: Kill a Shulker and collect a Shulker Shell for portable storage

subtitle.text: The outer islands exist outside the dragon's territory. They remember a different version of the End.

description: After defeating the dragon, the outer gateway opens.
Throw an Ender Pearl through the gateway to reach the outer islands.
Chorus Fruit grows in tall branching trees on the outer islands.
Eating raw Chorus Fruit teleports you randomly — useful for void survival.
Popped Chorus Fruit is used in crafting End-tier materials.
End Cities are generated randomly across the outer islands.
They contain some of the best loot in the game.
End Ships are attached to some End Cities — the Elytra is on the ship.
Shulkers hide in End City walls and shoot levitating projectiles.
Shulker Shells craft Shulker Boxes — portable chests that keep contents when broken.
You will need them for the deep End expeditions ahead.
→ Kill a Shulker and get a Shulker Shell [check]
